name: frontend-taste-engineer
description: Context-adaptive minimal-prompt frontend generation plus source-backed planning, building, auditing, refinement, privacy review, and production verification.

interface.shortDescription: Turn tiny prompts into complete production frontends
interface.longDescription: A source-backed frontend operating system that autonomously expands short website and redesign prompts into complete, context-appropriate, distinctive, responsive, accessible, screenshot-refined, deployment-ready implementations. Domain-aware intensity prevents one flashy house style, while request-local content policy and private-term scanning protect reusable knowledge and public artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Make a website for this idea.
Design and build a distinctive, production-ready landing page for this product.
Audit this frontend and fix its highest-impact usability and design problems.
Rebuild this screenshot responsively while preserving accessibility.
